vehicle: 2019 Toyota Tacoma TRD Pro Forza Edition (X 999)

measured_vs_menu.note: Menu friction magnitudes sandbagged by a consistent ~1.5x for this X-class build; menu SHAPE (downforce slope, friction-circle brake/grip ratio 0.95) matches measurement. Car-agnostic recipe: menu shape x measured game-vs-menu scale factor; measurement always outranks menu upward.
